title: createunwondrfullworld
description: [WIP] It's a create based Modpack with a lot qol, addons and performance Mods.
body:
[WIP] It's a modpack based of the [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod. 

**What it does**  
---
Trys to deliver a full create experiance.  
It includes most of the create addons.  
Modern performance mods like [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium),[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) or [Canary](https://modrinth.com/mod/canary) make the game run smoth.  
the terrain generation is made with these mods: [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic),[Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo),[BiomesOPlenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)  
Many mods qol make your life easyier.

**Support**  
---
worldgeneration is very buggy.  
for support, bugreport and suggestions go on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/nRwN7NkP)

---
<details>
<summary>Projects that make this possible:</summary>

[corpse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)
